fields.description: Select the item to project. Search by item code or item name.
fields.label: Item Code

fields.description: Auto-fetched: full item description from Item master (read-only).
fields.label: Item Name

fields.description: Select from UOMs configured for this item in the Item master (UOM Conversions tab). The item's stock UOM is always available.
fields.label: UOM

fields.description: Planned quantity in the selected UOM for this projection month.
fields.label: Qty (Planned)

fields.description: Auto-fetched: how many Stock UOM units equal 1 of the selected UOM. Always 1 if UOM equals Stock UOM.
fields.label: Conversion Factor

fields.description: Auto-fetched: the base/stock unit of measurement from the Item master (read-only).
fields.label: Stock UOM

fields.description: Auto-calculated: Qty (Planned) × Conversion Factor. Represents the projected quantity expressed in the item’s base stock unit.
fields.label: Qty (Stock UOM)

fields.description: Status set by the Production Plan Automation engine after each run. Created = Production Plan created. Skipped - No BOM = item has no active default BOM. Skipped - No Demand = projection qty is 0 and no pending SOs found. Skipped - No Shortage = formula result ≤ 0 (stock already covers demand). Skipped - PP Exists = a Production Plan was already created for this item in this projection run. Error - See Log = unexpected error, check Error Log.
fields.label: PP Status
fields.options:
Created
Skipped - No BOM
Skipped - No Demand
Skipped - No Shortage
Skipped - PP Exists
Error - See Log

fields.description: Production Plan created by the Projection Automation engine for this item. Click to open. Blank until the automation runs.
fields.label: Production Plan
